model.label: Claude Opus 4.6
model.description: Anthropic • Hybrid reasoning model that pushes the frontier for coding and AI agents, featuring a 1M context window.

pick.rationale: St. John's holds a slight but consistent edge across predictive metrics, ranking 18th-20th nationally compared to Kansas's 21st-22nd, with a marginally higher adjusted efficiency margin (+24.8 vs +24.48) and a superior offense (AdjO 119.9 vs 118.4) that nearly matches Kansas's elite defense (AdjD 94.0 vs 95.1). The decisive factors are momentum and form: St. John's enters riding a dominant Big East Tournament run where they won all three games by double digits—including a 72-52 rout of UConn in the championship—behind Big East Player of the Year RJ Luis, while Kansas stumbled to a 4-5 finish over their last nine games and was blown out 69-47 by Houston in the Big 12 Tournament semifinals with Darryn Peterson delivering a woeful performance amid lingering health concerns. Rick Pitino's tournament pedigree and St. John's superior 27-6 record give the Red Storm a meaningful edge in what the raw numbers suggest is a near coin-flip.

reasoningStep.title: St. John's vs Kansas – East Round of 32
reasoningStep.summary: St. John's edges Kansas in a closely matched 5-vs-4 seed game, driven by superior momentum, a healthier roster, and a slight statistical advantage across efficiency metrics.
evidence: St. John's ranks 18th-20th nationally (KenPom/Torvik) with +24.8 AdjEM, AdjO 119.9 (46th), AdjD 95.1 (12th)
Kansas ranks 21st-22nd nationally with +24.48 AdjEM, AdjO 118.4 (57th), AdjD 94.0 (10th)
St. John's won Big East regular season and tournament titles (27-6), beating UConn 72-52 in championship with Big East POY RJ Luis healthy
Kansas went 4-5 in last 9 games (23-10 overall), lost 69-47 to Houston in Big 12 Tournament semifinals
Darryn Peterson cleared to play but battled injury concerns all season with poor Big 12 Tournament performance
St. John's defense (12th nationally) is elite and nearly matches Kansas's top-10 unit while holding the offensive edge
